nasb.text: Then Isaiah said, “Take a cake of figs.” And they took and laid it on the boil, and he recovered.

esv.text: And Isaiah said, “Bring a cake of figs. And let them take and lay it on the boil, that he may recover.”

cnv.text: 以賽亞說：“取一片無花果餅來。”他們就取了來，把它貼在瘡上。希西家就痊愈了。

ccb.text: 以赛亚说：“拿一块无花果饼贴在王的疮上，他就会痊愈。”
